Full Recording .abf Water Treated: C1 Example "26225004.abf" and C0 Example "26225005.abf"

This is an example file included with the zeus package for testing and demonstration.
This file contains a full and verified Electroretinography recording from the ZENV laboratory based on published protocols.
The file consists of recordings using a standard ND sweep protocol (C1) (ND 3.0-6.0) in 0.5 incrimenting steps, that has 4 repears per level repeated 10 times.
As well as (C0) irradiance protocol (1.0-6.0) in incriments of 0.5, based on a 7 series sweep with controled ND levels based on wavelength.
There are a total of 280 sweeps in each file.

Data is was collected and utilized in published data.
See https://edspace.american.edu/connaughtonzenvlab/ for more information and recent publications.
